manifest.description: Record and play automated tests for Angular, React and other web applications

popup.title: 🎯 AutoTest Recorder
popup.freeTierLimitMsg: You can store up to {limit} tests in the free version. Delete extra tests or upgrade to a paid plan.
popup.noStepsExecuted: Test was started, but no steps were executed.
popup.alertUiNotFound: Error: not all UI elements found. Check the console.
popup.alertFileInputNotFound: Error: file input element not found. Use JSON paste instead.
popup.alertFileDialogFailed: Could not open file dialog. Try pasting JSON manually.
popup.alertInvalidTestFormat: Invalid test format. Required fields: name, actions
popup.alertExportModuleNotLoaded:
Error: Excel export module not loaded.

Check:
1. File excel-export/excel-export.js exists
2. It is added to web_accessible_resources in manifest.json
3. Console for details
popup.alertNoTestData: Error: could not get test data
popup.alertExportSuccess:
✅ Testing report successfully exported to Excel

📁 File name: {fileName}

💾 Choose a folder in the save dialog — the browser will save the file there.

ℹ️ You can also find the file via the downloads panel (Ctrl+J).
popup.alertExportNoHistory:
✅ Test exported to Excel (no run history)

📁 File name: {fileName}

💾 Specify the desired folder in the dialog — the file will be saved there.

ℹ️ If needed, find it via the downloads panel (Ctrl+J).
popup.alertScreenshotsCleared:
✅ Screenshots cleared successfully!

Cleared screenshots from {count} runs.
Storage space freed.
popup.confirmClearHistory:
Clear run history for all tests?

This will free up storage, but you will lose test execution statistics.
popup.confirmClearFiles:
Clear all uploaded files?

This will free up storage, but you will lose all uploaded files.
popup.confirmClearAll:
⚠️ WARNING!

Are you sure you want to delete ALL data?

• All tests
• All history
• All variables
• All settings
• All screenshots
• All files

This action is irreversible!
popup.confirmClearAllSecond:
Confirm deletion of ALL plugin data.

Click OK to delete.
popup.refreshPageWarning: Refresh the page before running the test
popup.idleWarning: No activity for more than 1 second. To start recording (or playback), refresh the page (F5)
popup.fileNotJson:
Selected file does not have .json extension

Continue import? (file must contain valid JSON)
popup.pasteJsonPrompt:
Paste test JSON to import:

Or click "Cancel" to use a demo test for ya.ru
popup.createDemoTest:
Create demo test for ya.ru?

The test will:
1. Open ya.ru
2. Type search query
3. Click "Search"
4. Click the first link

Click OK to create
popup.extensionRestarting: Extension is restarting. Wait a moment and click "Retry".
popup.backgroundNotResponding: Extension background page is not responding. Click "Retry".
popup.autotestsDisabledMsg: To use autotests, enable them in settings
popup.upgradeBannerMsg: Free tier limit reached ({limit} tests). Delete extra tests or upgrade to a paid plan.

editor.title: Test Editor
editor.noActions: No actions. Click "+ Add action" to begin.
editor.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave the page?
editor.apiImportTitle: API Import — add API steps from OpenAPI specification
editor.selectEndpoints: Select endpoints to add as test steps

settings.title: ⚙️ AutoTest Recorder Settings
settings.selectorLibrariesDesc: Choose which libraries to use for selector generation
settings.finderDesc: Intelligent CSS selector generator with optimization
settings.attributePrioritiesDesc: Order of attribute checking during selector generation
settings.selectorSelectionDesc: Configure how selectors are chosen during action recording
settings.modeAutoDesc: Automatically selects the best selector based on priorities
settings.modePickerDesc: Shows a panel with selector options for each click
settings.modeInspectorDesc: Opens full selector inspector for detailed analysis
settings.strategyStabilityDesc: Prefer stable, unique selectors that resist page changes
settings.strategyReadabilityDesc: Prefer human-readable selectors with clear attribute names
settings.strategyShortestDesc: Prefer shortest selectors (may be less stable)
settings.stepTimeoutDesc: If a step does not complete within this time, a dialog is shown: continue from the next step or stop the test. The console will show that the step was force-completed.
settings.deduplicateSelectorsDesc: Remove duplicate selectors from generation results
settings.enableSelectorCacheDesc: Cache previously found selectors for better performance
settings.asyncUniquenessCheckDesc: Check selector uniqueness without blocking UI
settings.smartSelectorScoringDesc: Consider length, stability and specificity when choosing selectors
settings.penalizeDynamicPartsDesc: Lower priority of selectors with UUID, timestamp, Angular hashes
settings.improvedDropdownDetectionDesc: Extended support for Web Components, Shadow DOM, ARIA
settings.exponentialBackoffDesc: Adaptive delays when searching for elements
settings.useMutationObserverDesc: Efficient waiting for dynamic elements to appear
settings.generateXPathDesc: Additionally generate XPath for complex cases
settings.improvedOverlaySearchDesc: Search dropdown panels in overlay containers (Angular CDK, Material UI, etc.)
settings.validateBeforeSaveDesc: Check selectors for dynamic parts and uniqueness
settings.metricsAndAutofixDesc: Quality analysis and automatic selector improvement
settings.calculateMetricsDesc: Calculate stability, readability and specificity of selectors
settings.autoFixUnstableDesc: Automatically replace unstable selectors with better alternatives
settings.minStabilityScoreNote: Selectors below this threshold will be auto-fixed (0-100)
settings.fileManagementDesc: Upload files to be used in autotests. Files are stored in the extension and can be auto-inserted into file upload fields.
settings.maxFileSize: Max file size: 5MB. Total storage limit: ~10MB
settings.excelEnabledDesc: Automatically create Excel files with test cases on recording, playback, or optimization
settings.excelAutoExportDesc: Export files without user interaction right after recording, running, or optimization
settings.excelAutoExportNote: By default, reports are only available via the 📊 "Export report" button in run history
settings.excelConsoleErrorsDesc: During test playback, save all browser console errors to Excel (in column N for the corresponding step)
settings.excelFormatNote: XLS format saves CSV with .xls extension (Excel opens without warnings). Choose XLSX for a full Excel file or CSV for plain text.
settings.excelDelimiterNote: Default is semicolon ; — change if needed, e.g. to comma ,
settings.excelPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to save to Downloads
settings.excelPathNote: If not specified, files will be saved to the browser's Downloads folder
settings.mediaPathNote: Folder name in Downloads for video and screenshots
settings.makeSeekableDesc: Process video for seeking support (slower but convenient)
settings.analyticsEnabledDesc: Show analytics dashboard button in popup
settings.autotestsEnabledDesc: Enable recording and playback interface in popup
settings.verboseLoggingDesc: Output detailed information to console (for debugging)
settings.excludeHiddenDesc: Do not record interactions with hidden elements
settings.smartWaitsDesc: Automatically add waits for dynamic elements

help.title: 🎯 AutoTest Recorder
help.subtitle: Record, edit and play automated tests for web applications
help.quickStartSteps:
1. Open the target page → click the extension icon → "Start recording"
2. Perform actions on the page: clicks, input, navigation
3. Click "Stop recording" → the test is saved
4. Click ▶️ "Play" to reproduce
help.popupDesc: Main control panel for recording, playback, and test management
help.recordingDesc: Click "Start recording" and perform actions on the page. The extension captures: clicks, double clicks, text input, dropdown selection, keyboard shortcuts, and page navigation. Stop with "Stop recording" button.
help.editorDesc: Click ✏️ "Edit" on any test to open the full editor. You can: reorder steps, add/delete actions, change selectors, set variables, mark steps as hidden.
help.variablesDesc: Define variables for reuse across test steps. Use ${varName} syntax in values and URLs. Variables can be static or captured from page elements.
help.playbackDesc: Click ▶️ to play a test. Optimized mode skips hidden steps. Full mode executes all steps. Pause/resume is supported.
help.apiImportDesc: Import API endpoints from OpenAPI/Swagger specification as test steps. Paste JSON or YAML spec, select endpoints to add.
help.settingsDesc: Configure selector libraries, recording mode, optimization options, Excel export, video recording, and more.

player.selectorFallback: Step {n}: selector "{sel}" not found. Searching for replacement...
player.fallbackPhase2: Phase 2: Trying selectors from {count} neighboring steps (forward 5, backward 2, incl. hidden)...
player.fallbackNotFound: Selector from step #{step} not found either
player.dropdownChain: Looks like a dropdown chain, trying 2-3 sequential steps from step #{step}...
player.chainExecuted: Executed {count} chain steps, trying original action...

recorder.recordingStartedSwitchTab: Recording started. Switch to the site tab and perform actions — they will be added to this test.

editorUI.optimizationNotRun: Optimization has not been performed yet.
editorUI.runFullToCollectData: Run a full test to collect data about redundant steps.

All nested actions will also be deleted!
